items.answer: I study at the history faculty.

items.prompt: Кафедра физики находится на третьем этаже.
items.answer: The physics department is on the third floor.
The dean signed an important document.
The rector spoke before the students.
The professor gives the lecture very loudly.

items.prompt: Доцент ведёт наш семинар по литературе.
items.answer: The associate professor leads our literature seminar.

items.prompt: Мой брат — аспирант на кафедре химии.
items.answer: My brother is a PhD student in the chemistry department.
My classmate lives in the dormitory.
The lecture was interesting but long.
At the seminar we discuss texts.

items.prompt: Я пишу конспект на каждой лекции.
items.answer: I write notes at every lecture.

items.prompt: Новый учебный год начинается в сентябре.
items.answer: The new academic year begins in September.
This semester ends in January.
I am in the second year of study.
My major is economics.
In a year I will get my diploma.
The diploma defense will be in June.

The PhD student is writing a long dissertation.

items.prompt: Завтра у меня зачёт по физике.
items.answer: Tomorrow I have a credit test in physics.

items.prompt: У него будет пересдача в августе.
items.answer: He will have a retake in August.
The winter exam session will begin soon.
The entrance exam was very difficult.

items.prompt: Выпускной экзамен по математике я сдал.
items.answer: I passed the final exam in mathematics.
He is a graduate of our university.
The first-year student looked for the lecture hall for a long time.
The lecture hall was full of students.
I live in a student dormitory.

items.prompt: Мы обедаем в столовой каждый день.
items.answer: We have lunch in the cafeteria every day.

items.prompt: В этом месяце я получил стипендию.
items.answer: This month I received a scholarship.
Higher education is very important.
Studies take a lot of time.
I want to enroll in university.
She was admitted to the medical faculty.

items.prompt: Завтра я сдаю экзамен по физике.
items.answer: Tomorrow I am taking the physics exam.

items.prompt: Он сдал все экзамены на пятёрки.
items.answer: He passed all the exams with top marks.

items.prompt: Я не хочу провалить этот экзамен.
items.answer: I do not want to fail this exam.
Tomorrow he will defend his diploma.

items.prompt: Мы исследуем новый материал в лаборатории.
items.answer: We are researching a new material in the laboratory.
Students analyze texts at the seminar.

items.prompt: На лекции мы обсуждаем сложные вопросы.
items.answer: At the lecture we discuss difficult questions.
The professor is proving his theory.
I am comparing two different methods.

items.prompt: Я буду выступать с докладом завтра.
items.answer: I will give a presentation tomorrow.
His presentation was very interesting.

items.prompt: Я прочитал научную статью о космосе.
items.answer: I read a scientific article about space.
This is a serious scientific work.
